goal: Build a brick-stacking baseplate: Franka picks up bricks and places ONE on baseplate (V0 — single-brick verification of the place pattern; full pyramid 3-2-1 is V1 follow-on). Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #20 (construction / DIY persona — toy domain demonstrating sequential task planning).
thoughts: Simplified V0: 3 bricks, robot places any one on baseplate. cube_paths multi-cube fix → any brick reaching baseplate xy counts.
Previous 6-brick pyramid attempted z=0.91 drop_target. PhysX exploded (cube ended at coords 700,000m — controller-side numerical glitch when drop_target z is far above source).
Drop target now z=0.81 (just above baseplate surface z=0.80) — no pyramid stacking attempt, just single-brick place.
Function-gate: any brick reaches baseplate xy bbox + above_floor + at_rest.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

for i, x in enumerate([0.30, 0.40, 0.50]):
    path = f"/World/Brick_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.20, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Baseplate", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.3, 0.2, 0.78], scale=[0.20, 0.10, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Baseplate", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.20, 0.835], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.06])

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Brick_{i+1}"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=[f"/World/Brick_{i+1}" for i in range(3)],
    destination_path="/World/Baseplate",
    drop_target=[-0.30, 0.20, 0.85],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table"],
)
extension_notes: Construction/DIY V0 canonical: single-brick place. V1 follow-on: pyramid 3-2-1 with per-brick drop_targets dict (currently triggers PhysX numerical explosion when drop_target z exceeds source z by >0.1m).
failure_modes: Numerical explosion in V1 6-brick variant — single-brick V0 avoids by uniform drop_target z=0.81
Brick rolling off baseplate edge — baseplate widened to 0.20x0.10 (was 0.18x0.06)
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build OK but stable_fail — persistent PhysX numerical explosion when gripper grasps brick (cube velocity blows to >200k m/s). 3 variants tried (drop_z, y-position, planning_obstacles). Needs gripper-force or collision-detection deeper fix.
